The '''Battle of Gendrah-Narvin''' was a battle including the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="TEA-" /> During this battle, the Alliance lost important agents. The lead pilot of [[Scandium Team]], [[Jouffer Talamiin]], was injured and became permanently handicapped. Due to this, he was replaced with fellow Scandium [[Aven Cholus]].<ref name="AJ11" /> [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] intervene in the battle. She transmitted mesages, dispensed much-needed material, and brought time for the Rebel evacuation.<ref name="TEA-" />
